changeSet.author: backend-agent
changeSet.comment: Insert global admin user (id=1) to prevent bootstrap from triggering. This must run before other test data that references user id=1.
changeSet.sql: -- Global admin user with id=1 -- Email: admin@eventify.dev (matches dev credentials) -- Password: "admin123!" (BCrypt hashed) INSERT INTO "user" (first_name, last_name, email, role, password, created_at, last_login, enabled, validated) VALUES ('John', 'Doe', 'johndoe@example.com', 'ADMIN', '{bcrypt}$2a$10$zO/ntKU1/JDupHoNEwDlnOqORuBV/K.YCGB5x1rMSVVViayrOo.cW', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '60 days',(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'), true, true);
